name: Should I hire someone for AI SEO or do it in-house?
description: Either can work. Choose based on your content maturity, technical setup, budget, and how much control you want over publishing.

mainEntity.name: Should I hire someone for AI SEO or do it in-house?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, especially if you are comparing agencies, tools, or internal approaches. The right choice usually depends on your content maturity, technical setup, budget, and how much hands-on control you want over publishing.
acceptedAnswer.description: Either can work. Choose based on your content maturity, technical setup, budget, and how much control you want over publishing.
